metadata.description: Hazn marketplace — AI orchestrator plugin suite for B2B/ecommerce/political website projects.

plugins.name: hazn
plugins.description: Runtime kernel — cross-cutting orchestration, brand-config loader, red-team baseline skills, editorial deliverable renderer, frontend-design primitives. Required by every Hazn job plugin.

plugins.name: shopify-revenue-audit
plugins.description: Deep Shopify revenue audit — 4-module composite scoring, honest P25-P75 quantification, mandatory red-team, Editorial Warmth v2 deliverable. Depends on hazn runtime.

plugins.name: hazn-legacy
plugins.description: Holding pen for v0.3.x consolidated content — drained over Phase 3+ per ADR-003
